subject: fix(builder): cleanup timer leaks, memoize excludeFieldIds, add title save feedback
body:
- handleCopyLink: use ref-tracked timer with unmount cleanup instead of
  orphaned setTimeout (matches CLAUDE.md timer leak pattern)
- handleTitleSave: show brief "Title not saved" error in header when API
  PUT fails, auto-dismiss after 4s with cleanup on unmount
- FieldPropertiesPanel: memoize excludeFieldIds array so ConditionBuilder's
  sourceFields useMemo isn't defeated by a new array reference each render

Tags: bugfix, performance, ux, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: conditional-logic-config
Semver: patch
